title: Updates to T&C and Sponsorship agreements for OSSI
rss_title: 🗳️  Updates to T&C and Sponsorship agreements for OSSI
author: ebullient
content:
[![🗳️ Vote progress](https://www.commonhaus.org/votes/commonhaus/foundation/304.svg)](https://github.com/commonhaus/foundation/pull/304#issuecomment-4179022631 "IC_kwDOKRPTI875FtMn")

Adjust Terms & Conditions to include disclosure of EoL versions and link to Foundation OSSI page.

Goes with https://github.com/commonhaus/commonhaus.github.io/pull/47

voting group: @commonhaus/cf-egc 

Do one of the following:

- React with 👍 (:+1:) or Approve a review  if it looks good to you
- React with 👀 (:eyes:) if you're "ok" with it (it may not be your favorite)
- If you think it needs discussion or revision:
    - Create a review, add your comments and require changes
    - Use the +- button to make a suggestion (instead of just adding a comment).
